presentation.title: shanecurry's Room
presentation.description: A guest room in the Treefort.

spaces.title: shanecurry's Room
spaces.description: A blank room ready to be decorated.

scoreGoals.label: Floor
scoreGoals.hint: ...a room needs some floor if anyone is going to stand in it.

scoreGoals.label: Rug
scoreGoals.hint: ...something soft on the floor would help the room settle down.

scoreGoals.label: Bed
scoreGoals.hint: ...it needs a bed before anybody can sleep in here.

scoreGoals.label: Desk
scoreGoals.hint: ...a desk would give the room somewhere to think.

scoreGoals.label: Chair
scoreGoals.hint: ...a desk without a chair feels a little rude.

scoreGoals.label: Lamp
scoreGoals.hint: ...a lamp would help you see what you are doing.

scoreGoals.label: Window
scoreGoals.hint: ...a window would make the room feel less boxed in.

scoreGoals.label: Shelf
scoreGoals.hint: ...somewhere high up for treasures would help.

scoreGoals.label: Clock
scoreGoals.hint: ...the room ought to know what time it is.

scoreGoals.label: Poster?
scoreGoals.hint: ...something strange on the wall might hide a passage.

interaction.title: Floor Note
interaction.noteText: fddshjkjhkjhkadfdsafdfdsdfdsaf oh I forgot to make it a note
